name: EDL-002 Impossible Travel Login
description: Flags a successful login for a user from a source country not seen for that user in the previous 7 days. Combined with the short rule window, a user appearing in two distant countries within minutes is physically impossible travel and suggests stolen credentials or session hijacking.
author: elastic-detection-lab
false_positives: Legitimate travel or first login through a new VPN egress point.
Mobile carriers routing traffic through out-of-country gateways.
